heading: Penalties
label: 80b–17 Penalties
text: Any person who willfully violates any provision of this subchapter, or any rule, regulation, or order promulgated by the Commission under authority thereof, shall, upon conviction, be fined not more than $10,000, imprisoned for not more than five years, or both.
notes: Amendments1975— substituted “imprisoned for not more than five years” for “imprisoned for not more than two years”.Pub. L. 94–291960— inserted “, or any rule, regulation or order promulgated by the Commission under authority thereof,”.Pub. L. 86–750
Effective Date of 1975 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 94–29section 31(a) of Pub. L. 94–29section 78b of this titleJune 4, 1975
